---
title: "Anne Manning"
---

## Anne Manning

**Dates:** (1807-1869)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

CMY contributed an article on her to <i>Women Novelists of Queen Victoria’s Reign</i>.  Perhaps the recipient of the letter from CMY; little firm evidence.   She lived at Reigate Hill from 1850.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 10th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
